FROM: Marcus Chen, VP Operations
DATE: April 8, 2024
SUBJECT: Distribution Center Performance Analysis

Our five distribution centers showed varied performance in Q1 2024. The Northeast facility processed 2,347 orders daily with 96.2% accuracy and 18.7 hours average fulfillment time. Southeast operations handled 1,892 orders daily at 94.8% accuracy with 21.3 hours fulfillment. The Midwest center, our largest, processed 3,124 orders daily achieving 97.1% accuracy and 16.4 hours fulfillment time.

West Coast operations managed 2,156 orders daily with 95.3% accuracy and 19.8 hours fulfillment, while our Southwest facility processed 1,734 orders daily at 93.9% accuracy with 22.6 hours average fulfillment. Corporate mandate requires all centers to maintain minimum 95% accuracy and sub-20 hour fulfillment times.

\]
